name: 14q21_OLFM4_SD
description: 14q21.3 contains an intra-chromosomal SD pair flanking the GNG2/NID2/PSMC6 cluster with small 5-20 kb modules at 93-97% identity. The block is a known fragile-site neighbour and harbours rare CNVs reported in colorectal-cancer somatic profiles.

architecture.internal_structure: Pairs of 5-20 kb SDs at 93-97% identity flanking GNG2/NID2/PSMC6; LINE-rich intervening segments.
